filefilter.name: binaryFileTypePolicyFilter
filefilter.desc: 过滤二进制、图片、归档及JSON配置文件

filteritem.name: *.har
filteritem.desc: 过滤 HAR 归档文件

filefilter.name: defaultPolicyFilter
filefilter.desc: 过滤无需许可证头的文件

filefilter.name: copyrightPolicyFilter
filefilter.desc: 过滤无需版权头的文件

licensematcher.name: MIT
licensematcher.desc: 识别项目中使用的自定义MIT许可证头

licensetext.name: * This software is distributed under a license. The full license * agreement can be found in the file LICENSE in this distribution. * This software may not be copied, modified, sold or distributed * other than expressed in the named license agreement. * * This software is distributed without any warranty.
licensetext.desc: 自定义的MIT许可证引用文本
